message:
test(redaction): add tests for overlapping matches and deduplication

Extends redaction test coverage with:

- TestOverlappingMatches: Verifies that when multiple patterns could
  match the same text (e.g., both GENERIC_SECRET and OPENAI_KEY),
  the higher-priority pattern takes precedence. Ensures no duplicate
  findings for the same text span.

- TestDeduplicationPreservesOrder: Confirms that multiple distinct
  secrets in the same input are all found and reported in positional
  order without interference.

These tests guard against regressions in the overlap resolution and
deduplication logic, which is critical for accurate redaction reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
